Registry / Terms / weighing cycle

weighing cycle

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #01360 · 5 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 5 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

Ed.YearPublicationClauseDefinitionConsistency
20102007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01360
T.3.2
sequence of weighing operations that includes the following: * one delivery of a load to the load receptor; * a single weighing operation; and * the discharge to bulk of a single discrete load
pending
20102004OIML R 61-1:2004
#00787
T.3.5
• • • combination of operations including: delivery of material to the load receptor; a weighing operation; and the discharge of a single discrete load, after the completion of which the weighing instrument returns to its initial state
pending
20101997OIML R 50-1:1997
#00517
T.4.3
the group of operations relating to each addition of information onthe load at the end of which the totalization device returns to s initial position or state for the first time
pending
202X2017OIML R061-1:2017
#03634
3.4.5
the combination of operations including: a) delivery of material to the load receptor(s), b) a weighing operation, and c) the discharge of a single discrete load after the completion of which the AGFI is in its initial state
pending
202X2007OIML R 107-1:2007
#01360
T.3.2
sequence of weighing operations that includes the following: one delivery of a load to the load receptor; a single weighing operation; and the discharge to bulk of a single discrete load
